username.title: Target username
username.description: Instagram username to investigate. No Instagram login is required in the default public beta flow. The Actor accepts plain usernames with or without a leading @ and searches for best-effort public comment traces, including traces left by private accounts on public posts when discoverable.

runMode.title: Run mode
runMode.description: Backfill runs spend more cycles trying to widen recall. Freshness runs are lighter and prioritize repeated updates using existing memory.

maxDiscoveryCycles.title: Max discovery cycles
maxDiscoveryCycles.description: How many internal discovery/scan cycles the Actor should try within a run before stopping. Higher values favor deeper recall at the cost of runtime.
